reviews.comment:
Unos d3lincuentes. Me dijeron que no había más nafta, solo diesel. Doy la vuelta manzana y le estaban cargando a una moto con patente paraguaya. El aire tampoco les funcionaba. Que cada uno saque sus propias conclusiones.

(Translated by Google)
Some criminals. They told me there was no more gasoline, only diesel. I walked around the block and they were filling up a motorcycle with Paraguayan license plates. Their air conditioning wasn't working either. Draw your own conclusions.
